programme.desc: Forbidden Science is a unique blend of noir science fiction and erotic programming. Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The stakes continue to climb as Green Light Sights rewards one top shooter with their very own custom weapon—proof that precision pays off. But there's no time to celebrate. Bear Arms ups the ante by issuing defense vests to every contestant, with one hard rule: once it’s on, it stays on. From grueling mission briefings to body armor plank challenges that push endurance to the brink, the weight—literally and mentally—never lets up. Still armored, the team reports to Ken Shamrock for another brutal dose of Lion’s Den physical punishment. Just when they think they’ve caught a break, Compliant Technologies’ infamous glove makes a shocking return to torment a fresh round of contestants. And as the day winds down, Don introduces the team to his personal “Flights” challenge—an unforgiving test no one is excited to take on. It all ends with a sobering CIA reminder: in the field, your backstory might just save your life—or end it.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Back by unpopular demand, the infamous “Blah Line” returns—and it’s more brutal than ever. The contestants kick off the day with a hellish PT session that leaves bodies broken and spirits tested. Things only get rougher from there with a punishing stealth crawl over jagged rocks, grinding them down before they face Ken Shamrock’s infamous Lion’s Den training—a relentless gauntlet of pain, grit, and raw endurance. As Don Mann continues to forge a battle-ready team, the squad is thrown into breaching drills designed for high-stakes mission execution. It’s chaos, it’s calculated, and it separates the contenders from the pretenders. In the heat of the action, two standouts emerge from the ranks—earning the coveted role of designated breachers.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: With the contestants narrowed down to 32, Don Mann and Randy Couture reveal a new twist that changes the game: a complex point system that turns survival into a strategic battle. Contestants face grueling military training and a brutal 5K run through Nevada’s desert, testing their endurance and mental toughness. As mentors and adversaries, Don and Randy push the contestants to their limits. This episode marks the beginning of an intense journey where only the strongest and most strategic will prevail.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: With mission day rapidly approaching, the contestants enter the zero-hour phase of their preparation. Outfitted by G-Cod…

programme.title: All Stars

In All-Stars the top 3 Surviving Mann contestants face off against 3 elite special ops veterans in a 50-hour no-sleep marathon battle of endurance, skill, and willpower. Do the All-Stars have what it takes to take on these spec ops legends? Find in Surviving Mann: All-Stars.

programme.title: Road Trip Angler
programme.desc: Jameson Redding visits Idaho’s St. Joe River, a pristine mountain waterway set amid striking wilderness and classic northwestern scenery.

programme.title: Adventure All Stars
programme.desc: Adventure All Stars is the world’s only socially conscious travel show – an inspiring series that combines adventure and philanthropy. Cast members travel to secret locations, to uncover the best and most exciting experiences on the planet! Pre-filming...

programme.title: Scotland Revealed
programme.desc: Scotland Revealed - This series celebrates Scotland's stunning landscapes and landmarks from the air

programme.title: Basin and Range Trail Thru Hike
programme.desc: The Basin and Range Trail is a spectacular 1090 mile thru-hiking route across central Nevada’s Basin and Range country, better known as the Great Basin. The Basin and Range Trail, an original long distance hiking route created by Eric Poulin, showcases...

programme.title: Hands Across The Border
programme.desc: Roy Rogers and Trigger star in this Republic Pictures western about horse breeders vying for a contract with the U.S. Army. The cast also includes such favorites as Onslow Stevens and Guinn Big Boy Williams, while songs include Hey Hey (It's a Great Da...

programme.title: Public Cowboy No. 1
programme.desc: Gene Autry and Smiley Burnette are back, and this time theyre dealing with some very modern thinking rustlers. These new criminals have taken up the latest technologies to outsmart the authorities, including shortwave radios and airplanes! Can Gene and...

programme.title: Captain Apache (Edited Version)
programme.desc: After Harry T. Collier, a beloved commissioner of Indian Affairs, is murdered in late March during the1880s, Captain Apache, an Indian graduate of West Point, is assigned by the army to investigate the crime. Suspecting that O.J., the sheriff of a town...

programme.title: Mohawk
programme.desc: Kurt Neumann (The Fly, Rocketship X-M) directed this bawdy tale of a love that was louder than war drums! With a cast that includes Scott Brady, Rita Gam, and Neville Brand, the story takes place on a remote army post where an artist romances a trio of...

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: A widow with a young daughter travels to a ranch in Wyoming to manage the household of a rancher. After a while the man and woman develop a relationship that leads to a marriage. But life in the harsh place takes its toll.

programme.title: Part I - Leaving
programme.desc: Two former Texas Rangers decide to strike out from their south Texas base and drive a cattle herd to Montana.

programme.title: Part II - On The Trail
programme.desc: McCrae and Wood's cattle drive faces deadly situations.

programme.title: Part III - The Plains
programme.desc: Gus and July save Lorena from Blue Duck, but at a deadly cost. Jake runs with a bad crowd and pays the price.

programme.title: Part IV - Return
programme.desc: The cattle drive reaches Nebraska, where Gus and Clara reunite.

programme.title: Part I - The Vision
programme.desc: Back in Texas, Capt. Call organizes a mustang drive to Montana.

programme.title: The Gene Autry Show
programme.desc: Gene investigates a rainmaker and a land swindle in which several honest ranchers are implicated.

programme.title: Raiders of Ghost City
programme.desc: Grit Xtra invites you to saddle up and ride alongside the larger-than-life stars of TV and cinema’s most iconic Westerns.

programme.title: The Gene Autry Show
programme.desc: Gene arrests a youth involved with outlaws, but the mother persuades Gene to clear him.

programme.title: Stranger on Horseback
programme.desc: A circuit judge (Joel McCrea) squares off against a ruthless cattle baron.

programme.title: The Virginian
programme.desc: Cowboy (Joel McCrea) hangs pal (Sonny Tufts), courts gal, shoots rustler (Brian Donlevy).

programme.title: Wagon Train: Season 2, Episode 35:The Molly Kincaid Story
programme.desc: A young woman joins the wagon train, fleeing a traumatic past in search of a new beginning. As she navigates the challenges of the trail, she finds herself drawn to a fellow traveler, but her efforts to start over are threatened when a figure from her former life catches up to her, forcing a desperate confrontation

programme.title: Stories of the Century S1E4 Geronimo
programme.desc: Railroad detective Matt Clark and his partner Frankie Adams are tasked with investigating a series of freight-car robberies. Their search leads them to the infamous Apache leader Geronimo, whom a railroad watchman has identified as the mastermind behind the raids. The detectives must venture into Apache territory to stop the unrest and bring the perpetrators to justice

programme.title: Stories of the Century S1E6 Cattle Kate
programme.desc: Railroad detective Matt Clark travels to Wyoming to investigate the powerful and dangerous Ella Watson, known as "Cattle Kate." Clark must navigate local corruption and land disputes to build a case against her, ultimately aiming to put an end to her criminal activities and bring stability to the territory

programme.title: Wagon Train: Season 2, Episode 21: The Martha Barham Story
programme.desc: A young woman joins the wagon train, mourning the recent death of her husband in the Civil War. Struggling to cope with her grief while facing the harsh realities of the trail, she encounters a fellow traveler whose own troubled past helps her confront her loss and find the strength to look toward the future

programme.title: Bonanza Season 2 Episode 3 Badge Without Honor
programme.desc: A retired lawman arrives in Virginia City, but his presence stirs up trouble when a vengeful outlaw recognizes him from his past. As the two prepare for a final, inevitable confrontation, the Cartwrights find themselves caught in the middle of a moral dilemma between upholding the law and personal justice.

programme.title: Heldorado
programme.desc: Heldorado is an annual parade celebrating Las Vegas as a frontier town. Roy is captain of the guards at Boulder Dam. He helps celebrate the town's anniversary while capturing racketeers involved with the local casinos.

programme.title: McLintock!
programme.desc: Wealthy rancher G. W. McLintock uses his power and influence in the territory to keep the peace between farmers, ranchers, land-grabbers, Indians and corrupt government officials

programme.title: This Man Can't Die
programme.desc: Bounty hunter Martin Benson seeks the leader of a vicious outlaw smuggler gang who killed his parents and raped his sister, while his other siblings hide a wounded gang member in hopes of more info and try to help.

programme.title: The Outlaw (1943) Colorized
programme.desc: Howard Hughes’ infamous Western The Outlaw blazes with passion, rivalry, and danger. When Billy the Kid (Jack Buetel) rides into town, he becomes entangled in a volatile triangle with gunslinger Doc Holliday (Walter Huston) and lawman Pat Garrett (Thomas Mitchell). But it’s the fiery beauty Rio (Jane Russell, in her breakout role) who sparks the most dangerous conflict of all. With smoldering romance, tense standoffs, and Hughes’ bold style, this legendary film pushed boundaries and made Hollywood history.

programme.title: Bells of Rosarita
programme.desc: Sue Farnum inherits a circus, but her dead father's partner is trying to take it away from her. Roy and Bob Nolan are filming a movie on location at the circus. They and a number of other western movie stars come to Sue's aid, putting on a show and catching the bad guys

programme.title: Future Energy
programme.desc: Host Philippe Cousteau looks at renewable sources of energy that can replace our reliance on fossil fuels and consequently, help clean up our atmosphere. Solar panels, wind turbines and hydro-power are clean forms of energy that are being developed and deployed throughout the world. There's also an environment-friendly replacement for gasoline in the form of algae biofuel. Philippe shares all the exciting new developments in this area and gives hope for a healthier future of our planet.

programme.title: Fabulous Felines

programme.title: Australian Animals
programme.desc: In this episode we travel to the land down under - Australia. Learn the science behind the one of the world's largest natural wonders, the Great Barrier Reef. See the ferocity of the Tasmanian devil, and meet the cute and cuddly Koala Bear.

programme.title: Future Energy
programme.desc: Host Philippe Cousteau looks at renewable sources of energy that can replace our reliance on fossil fuels and consequently, help clean up our atmosphere. Solar panels, wind turbines and hydro-power are clean forms of energy that are being developed and deployed throughout the world. There's also an environment-friendly replacement for gasoline in the form of algae biofuel. Philippe shares all the exciting new developments in this area and gives hope for a healthier future of our planet.

programme.title: Future Energy
programme.desc: Host Philippe Cousteau looks at renewable sources of energy that can replace our reliance on fossil fuels and consequently, help clean up our atmosphere. Solar panels, wind turbines and hydro-power are clean forms of energy that are being developed and deployed throughout the world. There's also an environment-friendly replacement for gasoline in the form of algae biofuel. Philippe shares all the exciting new developments in this area and gives hope for a healthier future of our planet.

programme.title: Future Energy
programme.desc: Host Philippe Cousteau looks at renewable sources of energy that can replace our reliance on fossil fuels and consequently, help clean up our atmosphere. Solar panels, wind turbines and hydro-power are clean forms of energy that are being developed and deployed throughout the world. There's also an environment-friendly replacement for gasoline in the form of algae biofuel. Philippe shares all the exciting new developments in this area and gives hope for a healthier future of our planet.

programme.title: Future Energy
programme.desc: Host Philippe Cousteau looks at renewable sources of energy that can replace our reliance on fossil fuels and consequently, help clean up our atmosphere. Solar panels, wind turbines and hydro-power are clean forms of energy that are being developed and deployed throughout the world. There's also an environment-friendly replacement for gasoline in the form of algae biofuel. Philippe shares all the exciting new developments in this area and gives hope for a healthier future of our planet.

programme.title: Future Energy
programme.desc: Host Philippe Cousteau looks at renewable sources of energy that can replace our reliance on fossil fuels and consequently, help clean up our atmosphere. Solar panels, wind turbines and hydro-power are clean forms of energy that are being developed and deployed throughout the world. There's also an environment-friendly replacement for gasoline in the form of algae biofuel. Philippe shares all the exciting new developments in this area and gives hope for a healthier future of our planet.
